qubbet_el_hawa.name: Qubbet el-Hawa (Aswan)
qubbet_el_hawa.description: Rock-cut tombs, Old Kingdom; Sentinel-1 used for subsurface/radar-break studies.

egypt_test.name: Egypt test tile
egypt_test.description: Small desert tile for pipeline test.

hawara_labyrinth.name: Hawara Labyrinth (Faiyum)
hawara_labyrinth.description: Rumored site of the Egyptian Labyrinth described by Herodotus. Near Pyramid of Amenemhat III.

tanis.name: Tanis (San el-Hagar)
tanis.description: Royal tombs, temples of Amun. Vast unexcavated areas. Sarah Parcak identified buried structures via satellite.

ubar.name: Ubar (Shisr, Oman)
ubar.description: Ancient frankincense trading post. Discovered 1992 using Shuttle Imaging Radar.
